calendar.matters:
Pet. For Order: 1) Accepting Resignation Of Trustee 2) Appt Successor Trustee 3)Waiving 4)Modification Of Trust To Name Additional Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Totah, for Petitioner Robert Burg

The Court noted that it appeared that everyone who needed to consent to the changes proposed by the petition had done so, and the only question was as to the notice to Mr. Michael Green, and confirmation of his willingness to be nominated alternate successor trustee. Mr. Totah stated that a declaration of Michael Green was filed with the Court yesterday, confirming his waiver of notice and agreement to serve as the alternate successor trustee. He submitted on the papers.
The Court granted the Petition for Order Acccepting Resignation of Trustee, Appointing Successor Trustee; Waiving an Accounting; and Modification of trust to name Additional Successor Trustee (subject to review of the order).
Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
